message:
Fix CDP message ID bug - use simple counter instead of timestamp

Chrome DevTools Protocol requires integer IDs, but Date.now() produces
timestamps that are too large and lose precision. Switched to simple
incrementing counter starting at 1.

This fixes the timeout issue where CDP commands would never receive
responses. Now all operations (navigate, extract, eval, etc.) work correctly.

Tested end-to-end: successfully navigated to BBC News and extracted
full page text content via MCP server.
